## Discussion

To determine an object model’s version checksum, use its [doc://com.apple.coredata/documentation/CoreData/NSManagedObjectModel/versionChecksum] property. Alternatively, you can find the checksum in the versioned model’s `VersionInfo.plist` file or in Xcode’s build log.

# init(_:)

**Initializer**

Creates a lightweight migration stage with the specified version checksums.

## Declaration

```swift
convenience init(_ checksums: [String])
```

## Parameters

- **checksums**: The array of version checksums.

## Discussion

To determine an object model’s version checksum, use its [doc://com.apple.coredata/documentation/CoreData/NSManagedObjectModel/versionChecksum] property. Alternatively, you can find the checksum in the versioned model’s `VersionInfo.plist` file or in Xcode’s build log.
title: init(_:)
